items.title: How an AI Bill Becomes a Law
items.summary: The question is no longer whether Congress is interested in AI legislation. It is whether the political conditions will align to move a proposal.

items.title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
items.summary: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.

items.title: ParcelBio Launches With $13M Seed Round
items.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, CA, ParcelBio, a biotechnology company developing a new class of potent and durable mRNA medicines, today announced it has raised $13 million in seed financing.
